zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance de Sutton於1356年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾德內斯時，她的父親Sir Thomas de Sutton51歲，母親Agnes de Hotham37歲。她於1384年12月與John Goddard在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1401年6月9日在英國英格蘭越可爾姆爾格拉福 卡素享年45歲，埋葬在英國越可爾澤特林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance de Sutton于1356年出生在英国英格兰越可爾霍爾德內斯时，她的父亲Sir Thomas de Sutton51岁，母亲Agnes de Hotham37岁。她于1384年12月与John Goddard在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1401年6月9日在英国英格兰越可爾姆爾格拉福 卡素享年45岁，埋葬在英国越可爾澤特林頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Constance de Sutton was born in 1356, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas de Sutton, was 51 and her mother, Agnes de Hotham, was 37. She married John Goddard in December 1384, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 9 June 1401, in Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Settrington, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance de Sutton est née en 1356, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas de Sutton, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Hotham, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé John Goddard en décembre 1384, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 9 juin 1401, à Mulgrave Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Settrington, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England: Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Constance de Sutton 1356 in Holderness, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas de Sutton 51 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Hotham 37. Sie hat im Dezember 1384 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom John Goddard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 9. Juni 1401 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Settrington, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance de Sutton è nata il nel 1356 nel Holderness, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas de Sutton, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Hotham, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato John Goddard nel dicembre 1384, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 9 giugno 1401, nel Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Settrington, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance de Suttonが1356年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas de Suttonは51歳，母Agnes de Hothamは37歳であった。1384年12月にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドでJohn Goddardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1401年6月9日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアムルグラブ カストルで45歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアセットリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance de Sutton(이)가 1356년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas de Sutton(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Hotham(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1384년 12월 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 John Goddard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1401년 6월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 뮐그레이브 카스틀에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 세트링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance de Sutton nasceu em 1356, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas de Sutton, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Hotham, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com John Goddard em dezembro de 1384, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 9 de junho de 1401, em Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, England: Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance de Sutton родилась в 1356 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas de Sutton было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Hotham, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Goddard декабрь 1384 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 9 июня 1401 г. в местности мулграв кастл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con John Goddard en diciembre de 1384, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 9 de junio de 1401, en Mulgrave Castle, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
